samples.text: All mammals are animals. A cloud is not a mammal. Therefore, is a cloud an animal?
Every mammal belongs to the category of animals. A cloud is not a mammal. Does it follow that a cloud is an animal?
All vertebrates are animals. A rain cloud is not a vertebrate. Therefore, is a rain cloud an animal?
A cloud is not in the group of mammals. Only mammals are stated to be animals here. Based on this, is a cloud an animal?
All mammals are animals. A cloud is not a mammal. Someone left the door open earlier. Therefore, is a cloud an animal?
